overview: A professional multi-page website combining D PHARCO ENGINEERING (pharma/chemical plant equipment) as the primary brand with D MECH HUB mechanical design/CAD services integrated as a dedicated Services page. SEO-optimized with blue/white/black theme.
features: Multi-page navigation: Home, About, Products, Services, Contact
D PHARCO ENGINEERING homepage with hero, stats, product highlights, DPE pillars
D MECH HUB Services page with 7 CAD services and project portfolio
Service detail pages with STEP file upload (3D CAD models <20MB)
SEO optimization: meta tags, OG tags, schema markup
Sticky header with D MECH HUB logo
Blue, white, and black color theme
